title: How will the fadeBounce coroutine run? Will the last line ou...

messages.content: How will the fadeBounce coroutine run? Will the last line outside of the for loop run after thee bool turns false or everytime the while() has completed a loop?

Will it always finish its iteration of the loop? if invunverable is set to false while it is executing is there a chance that a line will not be executed? So is it necessary to have the last line as a safe guard?
How do I lerp between the minValueColor and maxValueColor based on an integer?
